s: In 2019, Trevor Kelley suited up for BOS as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 8.640, WHIP 1.680, SO 6, WAR -0.200.
Changed teams after the previous season (BOS -> PHI).

Changed teams after the previous season (PHI -> MIL).

Changed teams after the previous season (MIL -> TBR).
